recipe.title: Chicken Enchiladas

ingredients.name: black beans
ingredients.note: rinsed and drained; pinto beans are an acceptable variation

ingredients.name: large flour tortillas
ingredients.note: corn tortillas can be used with extra care to prevent tearing

ingredients.name: Mexican-blend shredded cheese
ingredients.note: Asadero, Pepper Jack, or Mexican blend suggested

ingredients.name: red enchilada sauce
ingredients.note: homemade red enchilada sauce recommended by source

steps.text: Preheat oven to 350°F and prepare the red enchilada sauce.
steps.visualCue: deep red chile sauce glossy enough to coat a spoon
steps.textureCue: smooth brick-red sauce, medium viscosity, light steam
steps.runwayRisk: sauce can look like tomato soup unless chile color and thickness are specified

steps.text: Heat oil in a large saute pan over medium-high heat.
steps.visualCue: thin shimmering oil on dark pan surface
steps.textureCue: oil shimmer before aromatics hit the pan
steps.runwayRisk: induction must not show flame or burner glow

steps.text: Add diced onion and saute for 3 minutes.
steps.visualCue: white onion cubes turning translucent at the edges
steps.textureCue: softening onion with wet shine and light sizzling
steps.runwayRisk: tiny diced pieces may drift unless shot is macro and single-motion

steps.text: Add diced chicken, green chiles, salt, and pepper.
steps.visualCue: pale chicken cubes and green chile flecks spreading through onions
steps.textureCue: raw chicken turns opaque, chile moisture steams
steps.runwayRisk: raw-to-cooked transformation should be shown with hard cuts rather than a long morph

steps.text: Saute until the chicken is cooked through.
steps.visualCue: opaque chicken cubes with lightly browned edges and moist steam
steps.textureCue: juicy cooked chicken, glossy onion, green chile specks
steps.runwayRisk: avoid dry shredded chicken unless source variation is chosen

steps.text: Stir in rinsed and drained black beans until evenly combined.
steps.visualCue: black beans folded through chicken mixture without mashing
steps.textureCue: matte black bean skins against glossy chicken and onions
steps.runwayRisk: beans can become sauce dots; keep whole bean shapes visible

steps.text: Set up tortillas, enchilada sauce, filling, and cheese for assembly.
steps.visualCue: single tortilla on the island with red sauce, filling, and cheese nearby
steps.textureCue: soft matte tortilla beside glossy sauce and loose shredded cheese
steps.runwayRisk: avoid neutral ingredient lineup as a story beat; use it only as a quick context reset

steps.text: Spread two tablespoons of enchilada sauce over a tortilla.
steps.visualCue: spoon smears red sauce into a thin glossy oval on a pale tortilla
steps.textureCue: red sauce drag marks and tortilla grain
steps.runwayRisk: sauce should stay on tortilla and not flood the counter

steps.text: Add chicken filling in a line down the center of the tortilla.
steps.visualCue: spoonful of chicken, beans, onions, and chiles placed in a neat central stripe
steps.textureCue: chunky filling ridge, bean shine, chicken cubes
steps.runwayRisk: line geometry can collapse unless filling reference is clear

steps.text: Sprinkle about 1/3 cup shredded cheese over the filling.
steps.visualCue: pale shredded cheese falling over the hot filling
steps.textureCue: loose strands of cheese catching steam
steps.runwayRisk: floating cheese without visible hand; require visible fingers or falling strands

steps.text: Roll up the tortilla and place it seam-side down in a greased 9 x 13-inch baking dish.
steps.visualCue: tight tortilla roll sliding into a rectangular dish
steps.textureCue: soft tortilla folds, seam tucked under
steps.runwayRisk: rolling can create burrito shape if pan context is absent

steps.visualCue: parallel rolled enchiladas filling the dish in a neat row
steps.textureCue: repeated soft cylinders with visible seams
steps.runwayRisk: row count does not need exact eight if continuity preserves a full baking dish

steps.text: Spread remaining red enchilada sauce evenly over the top.
steps.visualCue: thick red sauce poured and spread across tortilla rolls
steps.textureCue: glossy sauce flowing into shallow valleys between rolls
steps.runwayRisk: sauce may erase roll topology; preserve ridges beneath the sauce

steps.text: Scatter extra shredded cheese over the sauced enchiladas.
steps.visualCue: blanket of shredded cheese on red sauce with some sauce still visible
steps.textureCue: cheese strands piled unevenly over glossy sauce
steps.runwayRisk: too much cheese can hide enchilada structure before bake

steps.text: Bake uncovered for 20 minutes until cooked through and slightly crispy outside.
steps.visualCue: baking dish in oven, then bubbling cheese and browned tortilla edges
steps.textureCue: melted cheese bubbles, red sauce simmer, crisp tortilla rims
steps.runwayRisk: use hard cut from unbaked to baked state; do not ask for long oven time-lapse

steps.text: Transfer the baking dish to a rack.
steps.visualCue: hot dish lands on counter with steam rising
steps.textureCue: active bubbling settling into glossy melted cheese
steps.runwayRisk: oven door and rack movement should be simple and single-action

steps.text: Garnish while hot with fresh toppings.
steps.visualCue: cilantro, red onion, avocado, crema, and cotija brighten the red-and-gold surface
steps.textureCue: cool fresh matte toppings against glossy hot sauce and melted cheese
steps.runwayRisk: tiny garnish pieces can drift; use controlled falls and stable final frame

steps.visualCue: spatula lifts one enchilada with stretchy cheese and red sauce trails
steps.textureCue: cheese pull, saucy underside, steam, tender tortilla
steps.runwayRisk: lift can tear the roll; use a plated portion or state reference if needed

assumptions: The video follows the source's flour tortilla Tex-Mex version rather than the corn tortilla variation.

The homemade red enchilada sauce is represented visually, but its full separate sauce recipe is compressed because the linked sauce page is a dependency and the requested recipe page provides the main flow.
The final dish can be shown as a full 9 x 13-inch baking dish plus one lifted serving; exact count of eight tortillas is less important than preserving the rolled enchilada geometry.
No paid generation services are launched; recipe-specific reference images are only planned for later app execution.
Mandatory ingest retry confirmed the source information is sufficient; no clarifying questions are needed for storyboard, references, duration, or geometry.
Validation after hardening rewrote this analysis as strict JSON before the GitHub checkpoint.

criticalTransformations.name: red sauce viscosity
criticalTransformations.risk: If too thin it reads as tomato soup; if too thick it reads as paste.
criticalTransformations.visualSolution: Use spoon-coating brick-red chile sauce with glossy flow and light steam.

criticalTransformations.name: chicken saute
criticalTransformations.risk: Long raw-to-cooked morph can look unsafe or rubbery.
criticalTransformations.visualSolution: Show hard cuts from raw cubes to opaque browned cooked pieces.

criticalTransformations.name: rolled enchilada topology
criticalTransformations.risk: Tortilla rolls may become burritos or flat lasagna layers.
criticalTransformations.visualSolution: Use assembly and unbaked pan references with clear parallel cylinders and visible seams.

criticalTransformations.name: sauce-over-rolls coverage
criticalTransformations.risk: Sauce can erase the roll ridges.
criticalTransformations.visualSolution: Keep shallow ridges visible under glossy red sauce.

criticalTransformations.name: baked cheese surface
criticalTransformations.risk: Melted top may become uniform plastic.
criticalTransformations.visualSolution: Specify bubbling cheese, browned freckles, crisp tortilla edges, and sauce pockets.

criticalTransformations.name: serving lift
criticalTransformations.risk: The enchilada can tear or the cheese pull can become excessive.
criticalTransformations.visualSolution: Use a final plated or lifted state reference with controlled cheese stretch and sauce trail.

visualTextureOpportunities: macro red sauce pour over pale tortilla rolls
sizzling onion and green chile steam
black beans folded through glossy chicken filling
sauce smear across a tortilla showing drag marks
shredded cheese falling onto hot filling
tortilla roll seam tucked into the baking dish
red sauce flowing into valleys between rolls
melted cheese bubbling around browned tortilla edges
fresh cilantro, avocado, red onion, crema, and cotija contrast on the hot surface
spatula lift with stretchy cheese, red sauce trails, and steam

possibleHooks.description: Open on glossy red enchilada sauce cascading over parallel tortilla rolls.
possibleHooks.reason: Texture-first, instantly identifies enchiladas, and pays off with baked bubbling cheese.

possibleHooks.description: Open with a one-second macro cheese pull, then jump back to saucing the rolls.
possibleHooks.reason: Strong scroll stop, but risks becoming a final-dish opening; use only as a micro flash if selected.

possibleHooks.description: Open on chicken and chiles sizzling, then quickly reveal it being rolled inside tortillas.
possibleHooks.reason: More process-forward, less immediate than the sauce pour.
